query:
INSERT INTO workspaces (name, type, status, priority, description, assigned_to, due_date, metadata)
VALUES (
  'Collins v. Robinhood Financial LLC — FINRA No. 25-02589',
  'internal_case',
  'active',
  'high',
  'Disputed crypto transactions on Robinhood involving alleged unauthorized account access. Robinhood denies liability based on device token matching. Forensic analysis of Robinhood''s own Exhibit B reveals anomalous IP addresses and location data inconsistent with Claimant''s historical activity, forming the basis for a Motion to Compel discovery. Arbitration No. 25-02589.',
  'Demarcus M. Collins',
  '2026-07-17',
  JSON_OBJECT(
    'caseNumber', 'FINRA No. 25-02589',
    'respondent', 'Robinhood Financial LLC',
    'claimant', 'Demarcus M. Collins',
    'opposingCounsel', 'Simeon Schopf, Assistant General Counsel',
    'opposingCounselEmail', 'Simeon.Schopf@robinhood.com',
    'lossAmount', 1289,
    'settlementOffer', 800,
    'counterOffer', 5500
  )
);
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS workspace_id;
